metadata.description: Diagnostic chains from DGT ITI syllabi — LLM-extracted (v2) + hand-curated (v1) merged with per-chain provenance. See ADR 008.

diagnosis_steps: Use engineer's stethoscope to localize noise
Check big-end and main bearing wear
Listen for knocking vs ticking vs whining

chains.symptom: Abnormal noise from compressor / magnetic clutch / blower

diagnosis_steps: Inspect ball joints and tie rod ends

chains.symptom: Abnormal tyre wear / wheel wobbling / poor self-centering / hard steering / vehicle pulling to one side
diagnosis_steps: Inspect chassis frame for bends or cracks
Check wheel alignment (toe-in, toe-out, camber, caster, king pin inclination)
Check tie rod ends and ball joints

chains.symptom: AC - abnormal noise from compressor, magnetic clutch, condenser, evaporator or blower motor
diagnosis_steps: Check blower motor bearing and cage

chains.symptom: AC high pressure gauge reading too high
diagnosis_steps: Check for air/non-condensable gas in system

chains.symptom: AC - high-side pressure too high/low or low-side pressure too high/low
AC - no cooling / intermittent cooling / insufficient cooling
diagnosis_steps: Check refrigerant charge with gauge set

chains.symptom: AC not cooling / HVAC insufficient cooling
AC system — abnormal noise from compressor/clutch
diagnosis_steps: Check compressor belt tension and condition
Check refrigerant charge with pressure gauges
Check refrigerant level (low charge causes cycling)
Check for moisture in system (freeze at expansion valve)

chains.symptom: Accelerator pedal problem / no throttle response
diagnosis_steps: Verify CAN message to motor controller

chains.symptom: Air in fuel lines (hard starting, stalling)
diagnosis_steps: Use priming/hand pump to bleed air from fuel lines
Service primary and secondary fuel filters

chains.symptom: Airbag / automatic seat belt system fault (error indication)
diagnosis_steps: Read SRS DTCs with scan tool
Read airbag system error codes with scan tool
Inspect clock spring in steering column

chains.symptom: all lights come on but dimly when ignition switch is turned ON
All power windows do not operate
Back-up / reverse lights do not light
battery drain / parasitic draw / battery not charging
diagnosis_steps: Clean and top up lead acid battery
Test alternator output and regulator unit
Inspect rotor for ground or open circuit
Inspect wiring from alternator to battery
Inspect rotor and stator for open/ground
Check for faulty voltage regulator (stuck closed)
Read BMS for SoH (State of Health)
Check cell balance / delta voltage across cells
Map battery SoH against cycle count
Inspect alternator brushes and slip rings
Overhaul brakes including cleaning and inspection
Reline brake shoes, set actuating clearance
Inspect hydraulic brake cylinder and replace washers/oil seals
Skim brake drum or disc plate if warped

chains.symptom: Brake lights do not light up
diagnosis_steps: Check brake light switch at pedal

chains.symptom: Brake / parking brake warning light - does not illuminate on low fluid or parking brake pull, or stays on

diagnosis_steps: Check brake fluid level in reservoir
Bleed hydraulic brake system (all four wheels)
Check master cylinder for internal bypass

chains.symptom: Brake warning light does not light when parking brake pulled
Braking system trouble - hard pedal / no brakes / air brake leak
diagnosis_steps: Inspect master cylinder and wheel cylinders
Check brake pads and shoes for wear
Locate air leaks in air brake lines
inspect cam chain tensioner spring and pushrod

chains.symptom: Charge warning lamp does not glow when ignition on
diagnosis_steps: Check wiring from ignition to alternator
Inspect alternator brush contact with slip rings

chains.symptom: Charge warning lamp stays on while engine running
Charger not delivering current / not charging
diagnosis_steps: Check charger type and voltage level compatibility
Verify contactor closing on charge request
Test OBC output with DC meter
Check BMS SoC; may be at limit
Verify AC input voltage at charging station
Check charging port integrity and pin continuity
Check CAN communication between OBC and BMS
Trace circuit from alternator to battery
Check drive belt condition and tension

chains.symptom: Charging system - undercharge / no charge / overcharge
diagnosis_steps: Check warning lamp behaviour with ignition on and running
Inspect drive belt tension and condition
Check slip ring surface and brush length

chains.symptom: Charging warning lamp does not glow when ignition on
diagnosis_steps: Check wiring to alternator L terminal

chains.symptom: Charging warning lamp stays on while alternator running
Check engine light / MIL lamp illuminated
diagnosis_steps: Read error codes with OBD-II scan tool
Test reference voltage on sensor circuits
Check wiring continuity per vehicle wiring diagram
Erase error memory and verify fix

chains.symptom: Clearance, tail & license plate lights - all or some lights do not light up

diagnosis_steps: Check clutch hydraulic system for air

chains.symptom: Clutch slip / clutch noise / clutch binding / hard clutch
diagnosis_steps: Check pressure plate diaphragm and fingers
Check pilot bearing and throw-out bearing

chains.symptom: Clutch slipping (engine revs but vehicle slow)
diagnosis_steps: Check clutch pedal free play adjustment
Inspect clutch disc lining for wear
Check for oil leak on clutch disc

chains.symptom: clutch slipping or clutch pedal free play incorrect
diagnosis_steps: Dismantle and inspect clutch plate for wear
Inspect pressure plate and release bearing
Check slave cylinder and oil seal
Check radiator for cracks or damage

chains.symptom: Coolant temperature meter shows no operation

diagnosis_steps: Read error codes with diagnostic scan tool
Check common rail pressure with scan tool

chains.symptom: Cylinder head warped / head gasket leak
diagnosis_steps: Check cylinder head flatness with straightedge + feeler gauge
Inspect head and manifold surfaces for warping/cracks
Check wiring from sensor to gauge
Compare gauge reading with standard parameters
Identify different gauges fitted on dashboard
Perform daily checks before starting engine
Record reading and compare with standard

chains.symptom: DC-DC converter fault / 12V battery not charging while driving
diagnosis_steps: Measure 12V battery voltage with vehicle in Ready state

chains.symptom: Defective battery module / module replacement needed
diagnosis_steps: Identify failing module via BMS cell voltage logs

chains.symptom: Diagnosis and remedy for-Speedometer shows no operation

diagnosis_steps: Inspect injector nozzles for proper spray pattern

chains.symptom: diesel engine hard to start or air lock in fuel system
diagnosis_steps: Check for leakages in diesel fuel line
Bleed the fuel system to vent trapped air
Test injectors for spray pattern and pressure
Check injector spray pattern and opening pressure

chains.symptom: Diesel engine not starting — electrical causes
diagnosis_steps: Check glow plug relay and timer

chains.symptom: Diesel engine not starting — mechanical causes
diagnosis_steps: Bleed fuel system for air locks
Inspect fan belt and fan clutch
Check injection timing (late timing causes overheating)

chains.symptom: Diesel engine white smoke on startup
diagnosis_steps: Check for coolant entering combustion chamber

chains.symptom: Diesel vehicle failing emission test (high smoke)
diagnosis_steps: Use diesel smoke meter to measure opacity
Inspect PCV valve and crankcase ventilation

chains.symptom: differential or final drive noise / wheel traction loss
diagnosis_steps: Adjust crown wheel and pinion backlash
Service reduction gear and rear axle wheel hub
Identify noise type: knocking, tapping, rattling, or grinding
Check engine oil level and pressure
Inspect valve clearance and rocker arm
Check connecting rod and main bearing clearance
Inspect piston and cylinder bore for wear

chains.symptom: engine compression low / unusual noise and knocks
diagnosis_steps: Inspect piston rings, ring gap, piston skirt
Measure cylinder liner ovality and taper
Check connecting rod bend and twist

chains.symptom: Engine coolant temperature meter shows no operation or incorrect operation
diagnosis_steps: Test ECT sensor resistance at known temperature

chains.symptom: Engine cranks but hard to start (ignition fault)
diagnosis_steps: Check spark plug condition and gap
Test ignition coil primary and secondary winding
Test distributor cap and rotor (if fitted)

chains.symptom: Engine cranks but will not start
Engine cranks but will not start (MPFI/ECU)
diagnosis_steps: Check fuel pump operation (listen for prime)

chains.symptom: Engine cranks but will not start or hard to start
diagnosis_steps: Check spark plug condition and gap
Check Hall effect / crank position sensor

chains.symptom: engine cranks but would not start
diagnosis_steps: check fuel flow at petrol tap

chains.symptom: Engine hard to start (fuel system electrical)
diagnosis_steps: Check fuel pump relay and fuse
Inspect fuel level sensor signal to ECU
Diagnose possible causes for hard or no start related to fuel system
Check mechanical causes: fuel delivery, FIP operation, injector condition, injection timing
Check electrical causes: battery, starter motor, solenoid, glow plug circuit
Bleed air from fuel lines if air entered system
Test glow plugs with glow plug tester (especially in cold conditions)
Test injectors for spray pattern on injector testing set
Verify injection timing via spill cut-off method
Inspect spark plug condition and gap
Pressure test cooling system for leaks
Check coolant level and top up if required
Reverse flush cooling system if blocked
check engine oil level and grade
Check coolant level in radiator and reservoir
Inspect radiator for blockage or leaks
Inspect fan belt tension and fan operation
Check for head gasket failure (bubbles in coolant)
Reverse-flush cooling system with flushing solution
Test thermostat valve for proper opening temperature
Check radiator cap for pressure holding
Check water pump for leaks and impeller wear

chains.symptom: Engine poor performance / poor fuel economy
diagnosis_steps: Connect scan tool and read DTCs via DLC
Test reference voltage and continuity of sensor circuits
Test sensors (MAP, MAF, O2, TPS, CKP, CMP) with multimeter/scan tool
Erase error memory after repair and retest
Investigate mechanical causes (compression, timing, fuel delivery)
Investigate electrical causes (battery, starter, ignition, wiring)
Use scan tool via DLC to read DTCs
Check reference voltage and continuity of circuits
Inspect for parasitic draws on 12V system
Check if main HV system enters sleep mode properly
Check for debris in motor housing
Inspect for cell imbalance in BMS

chains.symptom: EV dashboard warning lights — multiple errors
diagnosis_steps: Read all error codes with EV diagnostic tool
Check CAN bus communication between controllers
Inspect HV battery management system status

chains.symptom: EV high voltage warning / isolation fault
diagnosis_steps: Check for moisture in HV connectors
Check battery pack for coolant leak (liquid-cooled)
Follow HV safety procedures (de-energize before inspection)

chains.symptom: EV motor not running / jerky operation
diagnosis_steps: Check motor controller for error codes
Test motor winding resistance (phase to phase)
Check charging port and cable connection
Test AC supply voltage to charger
Test isolation resistance of HV system
Check high voltage battery state of charge
Test key switch and vehicle controller
Check for error codes on dashboard
Check battery SOC and cell voltages
Check for thermal derating (overheated battery or motor)

chains.symptom: EV reduced range / battery draining fast
diagnosis_steps: Check individual cell voltages in battery pack
Test BMS operation and cell balancing
Check ambient temperature effect on battery
Check BMS for charge limit reached
Inspect EVAP canister purge with scan tool
Check piston rings end-gap and piston-to-liner clearance
Check for turbocharger seal leak (oil in intake)
Inspect cylinder liner for wear / taper / ovality
Pull fuses one by one to isolate circuit
Isolate circuits by pulling fuses one at a time
Test relays and solenoids for stuck-on condition
Measure parasitic draw with ammeter (should be <50mA)
Pull fuses one at a time to isolate circuit
Inspect interior lights, glove box light, trunk light
Inspect piston rings and cylinder liner wear
Check piston rings for wear (compression test)
Check exhaust leakages and rubber mounting

chains.symptom: Fuel level meter shows no operation
Fuel meter shows no operation or incorrect operation
diagnosis_steps: Test fuel gauge sender unit resistance
Check wiring continuity between sender and gauge

chains.symptom: Gearbox noise / gear slip / rear axle noise / propeller shaft noise / universal joint noise / differential noise
diagnosis_steps: Identify noise source by driving conditions (coast/drive/turn)
Inspect gear teeth and bearings in gearbox
Check propeller shaft balance and U-joints
Inspect power steering pump and belt
Check for air in power steering system
Check tire pressure (low pressure causes hard steering)
Inspect ball joints and tie rod ends

chains.symptom: hard steering or excessive steering play
diagnosis_steps: Inspect steering linkages for excessive play
Check and adjust tie-rod and ball joints
Remove and repair front axle assembly
For hydraulic steering: check pump pressure, distributor valves, hoses

chains.symptom: headlight beams do not shift when HI-LO switch operated
Headlight misaligned / poor visibility at night
diagnosis_steps: Check headlight alignment with beam setter
Check for corroded or dim bulbs
Check alternator charging voltage (dim at idle = low charge)
Check oil pressure relief valve (stuck closed)
Inspect oil pressure relief valve for sticking
Test oil pressure sending unit accuracy

chains.symptom: High exhaust smoke / failed emission test
diagnosis_steps: Measure smoke opacity with diesel smoke meter
Inspect air filter (clogged filter richens mixture)
Test injectors for leakage / bad spray pattern
Check FIP calibration on test bench
Check for exhaust smoke (black smoke = over-fuelling)
Check O2 sensor and fuel trims via scan tool
Inspect fuel injectors for leaking or improper spray pattern
Test oxygen sensor and ECU readings
Check tire pressure (low pressure increases consumption)

chains.symptom: high fuel consumption and engine overheating

diagnosis_steps: Check piston rings for wear and ring gap
Inspect cylinder liner for ovality and taper

chains.symptom: Horn - no operation, poor sound quality, or sounds continuously
diagnosis_steps: Check horn switch in steering wheel
Inspect temperature sensor readings in BMS

chains.symptom: HV isolation fault / HV leakage warning
diagnosis_steps: Perform megger insulation test on HV cables
Isolate pack, OBC, DC-DC one by one

chains.symptom: hydraulic lift not working / 3-point hitch won't raise
diagnosis_steps: Check hydraulic fluid level and quality
Trace hydraulic circuit to hydraulic lift
Read error codes with diagnostic tool

chains.symptom: implement not hitching or operating correctly
diagnosis_steps: Check plough, harrow, cultivator, seed drill, trailer for serviceability
Perform hitching practice (single and three point)
Adjust implements for correct field operation

chains.symptom: Interior light does not light up

diagnosis_steps: Scan inverter DTCs with scan tool
Check inverter coolant level and temperature
Verify HV bus voltage into inverter
Check coolant flow and air lock
check connecting rod big end play
check air leak at inlet manifold
Check engine oil level and grade
Inspect main and big-end bearings for wear
Inspect oil filter and pickup tube for blockage
Test oil pressure with mechanical gauge
Check main and connecting rod bearing clearance
Read ECU error codes with scan tool
Check engine oil level and grade
Measure oil pressure at various RPMs
Check main and big end bearing clearance

chains.symptom: low or high engine oil pressure
diagnosis_steps: Check engine oil level and grade (SAE spec)
Check for worn bearings causing low pressure
Inspect turbocharger for axial clearance / leaks
Check EGR valve for stuck open
Check air intake and exhaust for restriction
Isolate each injector one by one to find defective cylinder
Check cylinder compression on suspect cylinder

chains.symptom: Motor not spinning / inoperative drive motor
diagnosis_steps: Check accelerator pedal input on CAN
Read error codes with scan tool
Check ignition coil output per cylinder
Inspect wiring to injectors and coils
Check refrigerant charge via pressure gauges

chains.symptom: No horn operation / poor sound / horn sounds continuously
No horn / poor horn / continuous horn
diagnosis_steps: Inspect wiring from relay to horn
Test horn unit with direct battery power

chains.symptom: no lights come on when ignition switch is turned ON

diagnosis_steps: check head gasket for coolant/fuel ingress
check for leakage at oil seals

chains.symptom: Oil pressure warning light does not glow
Oil pressure warning light does not light up when ignition on at engine off
Only one beam (High or Low) does not light
Only one headlight does not light up

diagnosis_steps: Inspect spring of shoe and lever
Test ignition timing with timing light

chains.symptom: poor fuel economy or engine performance
diagnosis_steps: Obtain and interpret scan tool data (if electronic control)

chains.symptom: Poor fuel economy or poor engine performance
diagnosis_steps: Scan for DTCs using scan tool
Check power steering fluid level and pump
Inspect tie rod ends and ball joints
Check for binding in steering gear

chains.symptom: possible causes for hard or no start of engine related to ignition system

diagnosis_steps: Check door lock actuator with direct power

chains.symptom: power tiller will not steer / field operation issues
diagnosis_steps: Carry out field operation check without and with implements
Check window motor with direct power

chains.symptom: Power window or power door lock - no operation
power window system for – all power window motors do not operate, some switches do not operate
PTO not engaging or PTO shaft rpm incorrect
diagnosis_steps: Measure rpm of PTO shaft against standard
Verify BMS is accepting regen current (SoC not at 100%)
Check battery temperature (regen disabled when cold)
Scan controller for regen inhibit flags

chains.symptom: Remote keyless entry / immobilizer no operation
diagnosis_steps: Check antenna coil around ignition lock

chains.symptom: Some power window switches do not operate

diagnosis_steps: Test solenoid pull-in and hold-in coils

chains.symptom: Starter motor does not stop running
diagnosis_steps: Disconnect battery immediately if motor won't stop

chains.symptom: Starter motor does not stop running after key release

diagnosis_steps: Overhaul starter motor: brushes, armature, bearings
Inspect flywheel ring gear for damaged teeth
Check ignition switch and neutral safety switch
Inspect starter motor brushes and commutator

chains.symptom: Starter motor not running / too slow / runs but not cranking / noise / does not stop running
diagnosis_steps: Perform pull-in test, hold-in test, pinion return test, no-load test on starter
Jump-start to isolate battery vs starter

chains.symptom: Starter motor runs but not cranking engine
Starter motor runs but too slow (low torque)
diagnosis_steps: Test armature for shorts using growler
Inspect starter motor brushes for wear

chains.symptom: Starter runs but does not crank engine

diagnosis_steps: Check engine mounting bolts and pads
Check fuel injection timing and balance
Check engine alignment with driven equipment

chains.symptom: Steering wheel feels heavy at low speed
diagnosis_steps: Check EPS motor and torque sensor

chains.symptom: steers to one side / does not track straight
Suspension defects - wheel hop / unequal ride height / noises / fluid leakage / excessive travel / bounce / vehicle crabbing
diagnosis_steps: Check for worn joints and damaged linkages
Inspect shock absorber for fluid leakage
Measure ride height left vs right
Inspect ignition coil and HT lead
Check alternator belt tension and condition
Inspect wiring from alternator to battery
Check for oil contamination on brake surfaces
Bleed hydraulic brake system if fitted
Inspect clutch disc for oil contamination

chains.symptom: Tractor engine hard to start in cold weather
diagnosis_steps: Test glow plug operation and timer relay
Use correct viscosity engine oil for temperature
Check fuel supply and bleed system
Inspect for radiator cap pressure loss
Check air filter (black smoke = restricted air)
Check control valve for internal leaks
Check hydraulic pressure to PTO clutch
Check front axle pivot pins and bushings
Check transmission oil level and condition
Inspect gear teeth for wear or damage
check dog clutch wear on gears

chains.symptom: Turbocharger malfunction (boost loss / oil leak / whine)
diagnosis_steps: Check axial clearance per service manual
Inspect for oil leak at seals
Check axial clearance per service manual

chains.symptom: Turn signal flash rate high or one side flashes only
diagnosis_steps: Replace burnt turn bulb on affected side

chains.symptom: Turn signal / hazard warning - flash rate high, one-side only, no flashing, flash rate low

diagnosis_steps: Check for oil contamination on brake surface
Inspect chain for wear and stretched links
Check clutch cable free play adjustment
Check engine oil level and type (wet clutch)
Check battery charge and electrolyte level
Check main fuse and ground connections
Check fuel tap and fuel flow
Check gear shift drum and forks
Inspect kick starter gear and return spring
Inspect idle gear and ratchet mechanism
Inspect carburetor jets and float level

chains.symptom: tyre wear abnormal or incorrect inflation
diagnosis_steps: Check tyre pressure against manufacturer recommendation
Balance tractor wheels, practice tyre rotation
Tighten wheel nuts in correct sequence
Use engine gas analyser to measure CO/HC
Inspect spark plugs for proper combustion
Check PCV valve and crankcase ventilation

chains.symptom: Vehicle pulling to one side during braking
diagnosis_steps: Check brake pad/shoe thickness on both sides
Inspect for oil contamination on brake surface
Check tire pressure on both sides

chains.symptom: Vehicle pulls to one side during straight driving
Vehicle will not go into Ready / no power

diagnosis_steps: Check tire for bulge or damage

chains.symptom: Windshield wiper no operation / intermittent / continuous / will not park
Windshield wiper/washer - no operation, intermittent, continuous, or wipers will not park
Wiper no operation / continuous / intermittent fault
Wiper not operating / continuous operation / intermittent failure
diagnosis_steps: Inspect wiper motor with direct power
Check washer pump if washer not working
